tagline: Restaurant supply wholesaler · W Garfield Ave, Glendale.

hero.heading: Everything a kitchen needs. Wholesale pricing.
hero.subheading: Restaurant supply for the LA-area kitchens. Smallwares, glassware, china, prep equipment, and consumables — wholesale-priced, in stock, ready for same-day pickup.

about.label: The warehouse
about.heading: Wholesale for restaurants. Walk-in welcome.
paragraphs: The Dish Depot has been on Garfield Avenue since 2002, supplying restaurants, cafes, and catering operations across the LA basin. Family-owned, family-run, and twenty-three years deep into the same customer accounts.

We carry smallwares, glassware, china, kitchen prep equipment, refrigeration, and consumables. If it goes into a commercial kitchen, we either stock it or can have it on a truck inside three business days.
Wholesale-priced for restaurants and walk-in friendly for chefs ordering for their own kitchens. Closed Sundays.

services.title: Smallwares & Prep
services.description: Sheet pans, mixing bowls, ladles, knives, cutting boards, prep containers. The day-one essentials.

services.title: Glassware & China
services.description: Restaurant-grade glassware, plate ware, mugs, and serving pieces. Mix-and-match by the case.

services.title: Refrigeration
services.description: Reach-ins, prep tables, under-counters, glass-door merchandisers. Quote and delivery within the week.

services.title: Cooking Equipment
services.description: Ranges, griddles, fryers, char-broilers, ovens, hoods. New and certified-used inventory rotating constantly.

services.title: Consumables
services.description: Take-out, packaging, gloves, sanitation, paper goods. Bulk discounts on standing orders.

services.title: Custom Quote
services.description: Opening a new kitchen, expanding, or refitting? Send us your specs — we'll quote the whole package against your line items.

reviews.name: Vahe S.
reviews.text: The Dish Depot has been the supplier for both kitchens I've opened in LA. Their pricing is wholesale-honest, the desk staff knows what they have, and same-day pickup is a real thing here.

reviews.name: Lucia M.
reviews.text: Best place in town for restaurant-grade sheet pans and pastry tools. The price per case is unbeatable and the consultations are genuinely useful.

reviews.name: Robert C.
reviews.text: Bought the glassware for our bar opening from Dish Depot and we've been buying our consumables there for three years. They know our standing order by phone.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Dish Depot, 546 W Garfield Ave, Glendale, CA 91204

seo.title: The Dish Depot — Restaurant supply wholesaler in Glendale
seo.description: Family-owned restaurant supply wholesaler on W Garfield Ave, Glendale. Smallwares, glassware, china, refrigeration, cooking equipment, consumables.
